hero.title: Building Technology That Powers Businesses
hero.description: At Threemates, we build modern software solutions that help organizations streamline operations, automate workflows, and scale efficiently.

company.title: Who We Are
company.description: Threemates is a software development company based in Bhubaneswar, specializing in ERP systems, SaaS platforms, web applications, and mobile solutions. Our team focuses on building scalable, secure, and efficient software products for modern businesses and institutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Our mission is to empower organizations through technology by building reliable digital platforms that improve productivity, automation, and decision-making.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a trusted technology partner for organizations worldwide by delivering innovative software solutions.

values.title: Why Choose Threemates
values.description: We combine technical expertise with a commitment to delivering real business outcomes.

items.title: Secure & Scalable
items.description: Every solution we build follows security best practices and is designed to scale with your growth.

items.title: Fast Delivery
items.description: Agile development cycles ensure your product is built, tested, and deployed on time.

items.title: Modern Tech Stack
items.description: We use React, Next.js, Node.js, Flutter, AWS, and other industry-leading technologies.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.description: From planning to post-launch, we provide end-to-end support and transparent communication.

items.title: Data-Driven Approach
items.description: We build analytics and insights into every platform so you can make informed decisions.

items.title: Iterative Process
items.description: Continuous feedback loops ensure the final product matches your vision perfectly.
